description_long: This object consists of three adjacent graves, each with a rectangular base and a vertical headstone, all set on a shared rectangular stone platform. The graves are constructed from a dark brown, polished stone, likely granite, with subtle speckling and a glossy finish. Each grave features a stepped design, with the headstones rising vertically at one end and the grave beds slightly elevated above the platform. Two of the headstones have a metallic or bronze relief or plaque, while the third has a black vertical accent on one side. The platform beneath the graves is a lighter gray stone, providing a clear boundary and separation from the surrounding ground. There are no visible inscriptions, crosses, or additional decorative elements on the graves.
description: A set of three polished brown stone graves with vertical headstones, set on a shared gray stone platform. The graves feature metallic reliefs and a stepped design.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three graves with their vertical headstones and metallic reliefs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stepped elevation of the graves and the thickness of the stone platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of the headstones and the uniformity of the grave structures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the graves and the black accent on one headstone.
